params.reason: fur skin or artificial fur of headings 43.03 or 43.04 used as apparel linings are excluded from the current section/chapter
made up articles of netting of heading 56.08 are excluded
Articles of Chapter 64 are excluded from the current section/chapter
headgear or parts thereof of Chapter 65 are excluded
whips, riding-crops or other articles of heading 66.02 are excluded

Articles of apparel and clothing accessories (except gloves, mittens and mitts) lined with furskin or artificial fur or with furskin/artificial fur attached on the outside except as mere trimming are excluded and classified in headings 43.03 or 43.04
made up articles of netting are excluded and classified in heading 56.08
articles of Chapter 64 are excluded from this section/chapter
headgear or parts thereof of Chapter 65 are excluded
whips, riding-crops or other articles of heading 66.02 are excluded
cuff-links, bracelets or other imitation jewellery of heading 71.17 are excluded from the current section/chapter
Strings, skins for drums or the like, or other parts of musical instruments classified in heading 92.09 are excluded
Articles of Chapter 94 (furniture, luminaires and lighting fittings) are excluded from the current section/chapter
Chapter 95 articles (toys, games, sports requisites) are excluded from the current section/chapter

params.covers: catgut or similar sterile suture materials

params.meaning: includes chamois (including combination chamois) leather, patent leather, patent laminated leather and metallised leather

params.covers: buttons, press-fasteners, snap-fasteners, press-studs, button moulds or other parts of these articles, button blanks
bags made of sheeting of plastics, whether or not printed, with handles, not designed for prolonged use

params.term: articles of apparel and clothing accessories
params.meaning: includes gloves, mittens and mitts (including those for sport or for protection), aprons and other protective clothing, braces, belts, bandoliers and wrist straps, but excluding watch straps

the material of the outer surface of the container being visible to the naked eye, even where this material is the outer layer of a combination of materials which makes up the outer material of the container

params.condition: articles with precious metal parts, pearls, or precious/semi-precious stones remain in headings 4202-4203 unless such parts give the articles their essential character
params.routing: If parts give essential character, classify in Chapter 71
